title: Looking to spend your time with a fishing rod this holiday season?
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay offers a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay offers a fantastic mix of fishing spots - from sandy beaches to rocky points - making it one of the Garden Route's most rewarding angling destinations.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay offers a fantastic mix of fishing spots - from sandy beaches to rocky points - making it one of the Garden Route's most rewarding angling destinations."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Whether you're hoping for a relaxed day beside calm estuary waters or a bit of action in the surf, there's a place for every angler."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Point","html":"The Point "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One of Mossel Bay's most iconic spots, known not only for ice cream, views and surfing, but also for great rock and surf fishing. Anglers often target species like musselscracker, galjoen, blacktail and bronze bream around the rocky ledges.","html":"One of Mossel Bay's most iconic spots, known not only for ice cream, views and surfing, but also for great rock and surf fishing. Anglers often target species like musselscracker, galjoen, blacktail and bronze bream around the rocky ledges."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dana Bay's First & Second Beaches","html":"Dana Bay's First & Second Beaches "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Peaceful, scenic and popular among locals. These stretches of beach offer opportunities to catch cob (kabeljou), elf (shad) and white steenbras, especially during early mornings and late afternoons.","html":"Peaceful, scenic and popular among locals. These stretches of beach offer opportunities to catch cob (kabeljou), elf (shad) and white steenbras, especially during early mornings and late afternoons."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Diaz Beach","html":"Diaz Beach "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A great spot for surf casting with plenty of space, making it ideal for families or groups. Anglers often get elf, kob and sandsharks, depending on season and tides.","html":"A great spot for surf casting with plenty of space, making it ideal for families or groups. Anglers often get elf, kob and sandsharks, depending on season and tides."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Little Brak River","html":"Little Brak River"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Perfect for relaxed estuary fishing especially in the afternoons when the light softens and the sun begins to set. Here you may find grunter, mullet and the occasional kob, depending on water conditions and season.","html":"Perfect for relaxed estuary fishing especially in the afternoons when the light softens and the sun begins to set. Here you may find grunter, mullet and the occasional kob, depending on water conditions and season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Santos Beach","html":"Santos Beach "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This well-loved beach, safe for swimming and close to amenities, also rewards anglers with good summer catches of white steenbras. It's a great option if you want a central, family-friendly spot.","html":"This well-loved beach, safe for swimming and close to amenities, also rewards anglers with good summer catches of white steenbras. It's a great option if you want a central, family-friendly spot."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hartenbos Beach","html":"Hartenbos Beach "},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A long, sandy coastline perfect for holiday fishing. Anglers often catch especially during the warm months. elf, kob and white stumpnose,"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Useful tips for a better fishing experience","html":"Useful tips for a better fishing experience"},{"type":"list","items":["Early morning and sunset are usually the best times for most species.","Check the tide certain species bite better around high tide.","Keep an eye on the wind: Northeasterly winds usually improve fishing conditions along the bay.","Use local bait like chokka, sardine or prawn for the best results."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Know the rules before you cast","html":"Know the rules before you cast"},{"type":"list","items":["Do not fish in marine-protected conservation areas.","Ensure you have a valid recreational fishing permit (available at most post offices).","Follow regulations on bag limits, size limits and closed seasons.","Keep the coastline clean: take all fishing line, bait containers and litter with you."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Looking to spend your time with a fishing rod this holiday season?
